lines.speaker: Hafuba
lines.text: I don't know what you think you are doing here human, but I do know that you will not live long enough to leave this place.

lines.speaker: Hafuba
lines.text: Welcome to the temple of Marimbo, child. In less busy times I would bless you, but I have not the luxury of free time at the moment.

lines.speaker: Hafuba
lines.text: However, feel free to stay here as long as you need.
